reviews.comment:
En pleno verano le cortan a propósito el agua al baño para que no lo puedas usar  , una mugre y un olor barbaro , se aprovechan porque es la única estación por ahí . Si tienen combustible pasen de largo carguen en Trelew o en Comodoro

(Translated by Google)
In the middle of summer, they deliberately cut off the water to the bathroom so you can't use it. It's filthy and smells awful. They're taking advantage of the fact that it's the only station around. If you have gas, stop by and fill up in Trelew or Comodoro.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12078125792324684984/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNVM3YtZjFnRRAB

reviews.comment:
Un lugar clave para la recarga de combustible ya q se encuentra prácticamente en medio entre las ciudades de Comodoro Rivadavia y Trelew, los caminos de ingresos a la estación tiene unos pozos q parecen trincheras....el patio de comida parece de un almacén....lo mejor q tiene el lugar es la onda q le ponen los empleados. Con poco pueden hacer mucho. A ponerse las pilas.

(Translated by Google)
A key location for refueling, as it's practically halfway between the cities of Comodoro Rivadavia and Trelew. The access roads to the station are riddled with potholes that look like trenches... the food court resembles a general store... the best thing about the place is the positive attitude of the employees. They can do a lot with very little. They need to step up their game.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12078125792324684984/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURrMl9paFd3EAE
